data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified UI elements to minimize decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: Key options are prioritized on the feed and profile screens.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Optimized touch targets for user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Enlarged interactive elements based on user touch data.

data.title: Doherty Threshold
data.description: Ensures fast system response times to keep users engaged.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design that enhances perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: High-quality imagery and a coherent color scheme.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Intuitive grouping of related items to enhance navigation.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping in UI layouts, such as story highlights.
